channel.title: Hardware on Hackerman's Hacking Tutorials
channel.description: Recent content in Hardware on Hackerman's Hacking Tutorials

item.title: AI Borked my Keyboard - Reversing the Aula F108 Pro Software
item.description:
I used GPT-5.4 and Claude Opus 4.6 to reverse engineer the Aula F108 Pro keyboard's software using Ghidra MCP. This is how I did it, what setbacks I had, and how (A)I borked the keyboard's screen despite constant supervision and review. A common issue with the keyboard is that it ACKs bad messages, then silently drops them. Did Gene Wolfe write this firmware?

I also introduce the novel wording of (A)I, meaning both I and AI did something, because everyone is making things up, why not me? I assume I need to give it a name, a logo, and a website to become an AIfluencer?

item.title: Disabling Cascade Fan's Beep
item.description:
TL;DR:

  1. Open 11 screws.
  2. Remove the cap on the buzzer.
  3. Done.
